name: asana
description: Asana API client — list projects/sections/tasks, read task details with custom fields, write custom field values

tools.name: me
tools.description: Get the authenticated user (gid, name, email)

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces the user belongs to

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects in a workspace, optionally filtered by name

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks filtered by project, section, assignee, and custom-field state

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get full task details including custom fields, notes, permalink

tools.name: set_field
tools.description: Set a single custom field on a task by field name + value (enum or text)
